revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月初九]][[zh:正月初九]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 9|qq=January 9}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 9''' is the 9th day of the month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}}, the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Kōshō|en|Emperor Kōshō|qid=Q312841|lt=Emperor Kōshō|1=Emperor Kōshō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|February 21|en|February 21|qid=Q2350|lt=February 21|1=February 21}} , [[475 BC]]) – {{ill|Emperor Kōshō|en|Emperor Kōshō|qid=Q312841|lt=Emperor Kōshō|1=Emperor Kōshō}} ascends the throne.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|qid=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 21st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|802|en|802|qid=Q29992|lt=802|1=802}} {{ill|February 14|en|February 14|qid=Q2332|lt=February 14|1=February 14}}) – The shogun and {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|en|Hōjō Tokimasa|qid=Q589811|lt=Hojo Tokimasa|1=Hōjō Tokimasa}} received orders to build Tanasawa Castle as a base for the Ezo expedition. * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 12nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1569|en|1569|qid=Q6653|lt=1569|1=1569}} {{ill|January 25|en|January 25|qid=Q2279|lt=January 25|1=January 25}}) – While advancing toward Kyoto, {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} attacked the town of {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai|1=Sakai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11428087}}, imposed military levies, but was counterattacked by the {{ill|Miyoshi Triumvirate|ja|三好三人衆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyoshi Triumvirate|1=Miyoshi Trio|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8192653}}. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|February 13|en|February 13|qid=Q2333|lt=February 13|1=February 13}}) – Crown Prince Mutsuhito (later {{ill|Emperor Meiji|en|Emperor Meiji|qid=Q174231|lt=Meiji Tennō|1=Emperor Meiji}}) acceded. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|February 2|en|February 2|qid=Q2313|lt=February 2|1=February 2}}) – During the transfer of Osaka Castle from the old bakufu to the new government, the castle caught fire.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Kōan|en|Emperor Kōan|qid=Q312821|lt=Emperor Kōan|1=Emperor Kōan}} 102nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|291 BC|en|291 BC|qid=Q80161|lt=291 BC|1=291 BC}} {{ill|February 27|en|February 27|qid=Q2361|lt=February 27|1=February 27}}) – Emperor Kōan, the 6th Emperor of Japan. * {{ill|Ninji|ja|仁慈天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1242|en|1242|qid=Q5437|lt=1242|1=1242}} {{ill|February 10|en|February 10|qid=Q2325|lt=February 10|1=February 10}}) – Emperor Ninji, the 87th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1231|en|1231|qid=Q5417|lt=1231|1=1231}}). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1193910}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1781|en|1781|qid=Q7719|lt=1781|1=1781}} {{ill|February 1|en|February 1|qid=Q2312|lt=February 1|1=February 1}}) – {{ill|Yuasachōzan|ja|湯浅常山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuasachōzan|1=Yuasa Jōzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6565723}}, a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1708|en|1708|qid=Q6846|lt=1708|1=1708}}). * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1795|en|1795|qid=Q7815|lt=1795|1=1795}} {{ill|February 27|en|February 27|qid=Q2361|lt=February 27|1=February 27}}) – {{ill|Tanikaze Kajinosuke|en|Tanikaze Kajinosuke|qid=Q323465|lt=Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|1=Tanikaze Kajinosuke}}, the 4th Yokozuna (born {{ill|1750|en|1750|qid=Q7611|lt=1750|1=1750}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|8|1|10|12|9|2|1|0109|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 1월 9일]] [[ja:1月9日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:正月初九]]
[[ar:January 9 (Lunisolar)]]
<!-- No births listed --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月初九]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月初九]] {{wikidata link|Q838914}} [[Category:Days 9 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar January]] [[Category:Senbu]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
